idea-plugin.name: Nebula Haze
idea-plugin.description:
A cold, deep-space dark theme for JetBrains Rider built around muted nebula syntax, dark chrome, and sparse warm stellar accents.
Features: - Nebula Haze palette: cold blues and violets over deeper editor and chrome surfaces - Full ReSharper semantic highlighting: structs, enums, delegates, events, extension methods, generics - Dimmed inlay hints: subordinate to code, won't compete with LINQ chains or parameter lists - Extends Islands Dark — no chrome overrides that fight the IDE
